VAL-URL-001.evidence: lib/config/app-url.ts exists and exports APP_URL, INTERNAL_APP_URL, API_BASE_URL, DOCS_URL, SUPPORT_EMAIL, LEGAL_EMAIL, PASSKEY_RP_ID, PASSKEY_ORIGIN, plus NOTIFICATION_DOMAIN. No fallback to 'inbound.new' anywhere — APP_URL falls back to 'http://localhost:3000', DOCS_URL falls back to '${APP_URL}/docs', SUPPORT_EMAIL and LEGAL_EMAIL fall back to empty string. grep for 'inbound.new' in lib/config/ returned zero results.

VAL-URL-002.evidence: rg 'inbound\.new' lib/ app/api/ app/actions/ app/vercel-oss-program/ emails/ components/email-banner.tsx --glob '!*.test.ts' returned zero results. The only matches in the search scope were in app/api/e2/e2e.test.ts (a test file, which is exempt).
